+    private sealed record SimulationFinanceSeed(
+        Guid CompanyId,
+        Guid OtherCompanyId,
+        string OwnerSubject,
+        string OwnerEmail,
+        string OwnerDisplayName,
+        string ApproverSubject,
+        string ApproverEmail,
+        string ApproverDisplayName);
+
+    private sealed record ReplaySeed(
+        Guid CompanyAId,
+        Guid CompanyBId,
+        string Subject,
+        string Email,
+        string DisplayName);
+
+    private sealed record ApprovalStepSnapshot(Guid ApprovalId, Guid StepId);
+
+    private sealed record PersistenceSnapshot(
+        int InvoiceCount,
+        int BillCount,
+        int TransactionCount,
+        int BalanceCount,
+        int TaskCount,
+        int ApprovalCount,
+        int AuditCount,
+        int ActivityCount,
+        int AlertCount,
+        IReadOnlyList<DateTime> AnomalyDates,
+        int OtherCompanyInvoiceCount,
+        int OtherCompanyBillCount,
+        int OtherCompanyTransactionCount,
+        int OtherCompanyAlertCount);
+
+    private sealed record FinanceReplaySnapshot(
+        IReadOnlyList<string> InvoiceRows,
+        IReadOnlyList<string> BillRows,
+        IReadOnlyList<string> TransactionRows,
+        IReadOnlyList<string> ApprovalRows,
+        IReadOnlyList<string> AlertTypes,
+        IReadOnlyList<string> AlertDates,
+        IReadOnlyList<string> AuditActions);
+
+    private sealed class MutableTimeProvider : TimeProvider
+    {
+        private DateTimeOffset _utcNow;
+
+        public MutableTimeProvider(DateTimeOffset utcNow)
+        {
+            _utcNow = utcNow;
+        }
+
+        public override DateTimeOffset GetUtcNow() => _utcNow;
+
+        public void Advance(TimeSpan duration)
+        {
+            _utcNow = _utcNow.Add(duration);
+        }
+    }
+}
+END_OF_PATCH
